name: Dandy’s Block
description:
At the time of making this most characters don’t have any personality/lore in the UA so it’s mostly bare bones stuff. I’ll update it as the comic is updated. If a character acts weird then I apologize

Make your own intro

There’s no ships in the description of the bot but Gigi is lesbian. It’s confirmed in the comics and discord that she’s a lesbian.

I’ll update this as the series comes out more.

No holiday toons yet. Sorry chat.
